prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Crystal structure of the human myeloid cell activating receptor TREM-1. Entity description: triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 1. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: membrane_context_strong topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
